target_beneficiaries: SC girl students who are first graduates in family in Tamil Nadu

name: Amma Two-Wheeler Scheme (Puratchi Thalaivar Scheme) — Tamil Nadu
ministry: Industries Department, Tamil Nadu
description: Subsidised two-wheelers for working women in Tamil Nadu to enhance mobility and employment access.
benefits: 50% subsidy on two-wheeler (scooter) up to Rs. 25,000; For working women in private sector/self-employed
documents_required: Aadhaar, Employment proof, Driving licence, Bank account, Income proof
target_beneficiaries: Working women aged 21-45 in Tamil Nadu

name: Rajarshi Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Scholarship — Maharashtra
ministry: Social Justice and Special Assistance Department, Maharashtra
description: Post-matric scholarship for OBC/VJNT/SBC students in Maharashtra for higher education.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement; Maintenance allowance Rs. 235-700/month; Hostel allowance
income_limit_display: Annual family income up to Rs. 1 lakh
education_requirement: Class 10 passed; enrolled in post-matric education
documents_required: Aadhaar, OBC/VJNT/SBC certificate, Income certificate, Marksheet, Bonafide certificate, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: OBC/VJNT/SBC students in Maharashtra pursuing post-matric education

name: Annabhau Sathe Development Corporation Loans — Maharashtra
ministry: Social Justice and Special Assistance Department, Maharashtra
description: Low-interest loans to Matang community (NT-C) for self-employment, education and housing.
benefits: Self-employment loan up to Rs. 50,000 at 4% interest; Educational loan up to Rs. 1 lakh; Housing loan up to Rs. 1.5 lakh
income_limit_display: Annual income up to Rs. 1 lakh
documents_required: Aadhaar, Caste certificate (NT-C/Matang), Income certificate, Bank account, Business plan
target_beneficiaries: Matang/NT-C community members in Maharashtra

name: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Aids & Appliances (ADIP)
name_hindi: विकलांग व्यक्तियों के लिए सहायक उपकरण
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / DEPwD
description: Purchase and distribution of assistive devices and appliances to disabled persons to restore physical, social and psychological independence.
benefits: Free assistive devices: tricycles, wheelchairs, crutches, hearing aids, artificial limbs, Braille kits, SMART canes; For below Rs. 20,000/month income
benefit_amount: Free assistive devices (value up to Rs. 10,000-50,000)
income_limit_display: Annual income up to Rs. 2.4 lakh (Rs. 20,000/month)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Disability certificate (40%+), Income certificate, Prescription from orthopaedic doctor, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: Persons with 40%+ disability and income below Rs. 2.4 lakh

name: Accessible India Campaign (Sugamya Bharat)
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / DEPwD
description: Making public places, transportation, ICT infrastructure accessible to persons with disabilities.
benefits: Barrier-free access in public buildings, transport; Accessible website; Sign language interpretation; Free travel in government buses for disabled
documents_required: Disability certificate (for specific benefits like bus pass)
target_beneficiaries: Persons with disabilities

name: Unique Disability ID (UDID) Project
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / DEPwD
description: Creating a national database of persons with disabilities and issuing a unique disability ID card for easy access to benefits.
benefits: UDID card with QR code; One-stop access to all disability scheme benefits; No repeated documentation for schemes
benefit_amount: Free UDID card + simplified scheme access
documents_required: Aadhaar, Medical disability certificate from government hospital, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: All persons with any disability

name: NMDFC Term Loan Scheme for Minorities
ministry: Ministry of Minority Affairs
description: Low-interest loans for income-generating activities for economically backward minorities.
benefits: Loan up to Rs. 20 lakh at 6% interest (women 5%); For education, self-employment, trade, vocational training
benefit_amount: Up to 2000000 loan at 5-6 percent interest
income_limit_display: Annual family income up to Rs. 3 lakh
caste_category: Minority communities (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Parsi, Jain)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Minority community certificate, Income certificate, Bank account, Business plan, Guarantor
target_beneficiaries: Economically backward persons from minority communities

name: Working Women Hostel Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Safe and affordable hostel accommodation for working women away from home in urban/semi-urban/rural areas.
benefits: Subsidised hostel accommodation; Day-care facility for children; Security; Near workplace; Government grant for construction
documents_required: Aadhaar, Employment proof, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: Working women residing away from home

name: Ujjawala — Prevention of Trafficking and Rescue of Victims
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Comprehensive scheme to combat trafficking of women and children for commercial sexual exploitation and forced labour.
benefits: Rescue and rehabilitation of victims; Safe shelter; Legal aid; Medical assistance; Vocational training; Reintegration support
documents_required: No documents required (emergency service)
target_beneficiaries: Women and children who are victims or at risk of trafficking

name: Nirbhaya Fund — Women Safety Schemes
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Corpus fund to support initiatives for safety and security of women in India including emergency helpline, safe city, and women help desk at police stations.
benefits: Emergency Response Support System (112); Safe city for women; Women help desks at police stations; Fast-track courts for rape cases; Central Victim Compensation Fund
benefit_amount: Free safety services and legal aid
documents_required: No documents for helpline
target_beneficiaries: All women across India

name: Pradhan Mantri Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan (PMGDISHA)
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
description: Make 6 crore rural households digitally literate — one member per household to be trained in basic digital skills.
benefits: Free 20-hour digital literacy training; Certificate; Training in internet browsing, digital payments, email, online services
documents_required: Aadhaar
target_beneficiaries: One member per rural household who is not digitally literate

name: Aadhaar-Based DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer)
ministry: Ministry of Finance / DBT Mission
description: Platform for direct transfer of government subsidies, scholarships, and benefits directly to beneficiary bank accounts linked with Aadhaar.
benefits: Elimination of middlemen; Timely receipt of all government benefits; Reduced leakage; Over 300 schemes on DBT platform
benefit_amount: Enables transfer of benefits from 300+ schemes
documents_required: Aadhaar linked to bank account
target_beneficiaries: All government scheme beneficiaries

name: UMANG — Unified Mobile Application for New-age Governance
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
description: Single mobile app providing access to 1,200+ government services including PF, Aadhaar, PM-KISAN, scholarships, health, and more.
benefits: Access to 1,200+ central and state government services on mobile; 13 languages supported; PF balance, EPFO claims, scholarship status, land records
documents_required: Aadhaar / mobile number (for login)
target_beneficiaries: All citizens of India

name: PM KUSUM Scheme (Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan)
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Solar pumps and solar power plants for farmers to provide energy security and additional income.
benefits: Component A: Solar power plants on barren land (farmer gets Rs. 60,000-75,000/year lease); Component B: 60% subsidy on standalone solar pumps; Component C: Solarise grid-connected pumps
benefit_amount: 60 percent subsidy on solar pump OR 60000-75000 per year land lease
documents_required: Aadhaar, Land records, Bank account, Electricity connection proof (for component C)
target_beneficiaries: Farmers for solar energy adoption and additional income

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Free LPG connection to women from BPL households to replace chulha with clean cooking fuel.
benefits: Free LPG connection with first cylinder free; Deposit-free connection; Rs. 1,600 financial assistance for connection; Stove loan
benefit_amount: Free connection + first cylinder + Rs 1600 assistance
documents_required: Aadhaar, BPL card/SECC data, Bank account, Address proof
target_beneficiaries: Women from BPL households without LPG connection

name: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana (Rooftop Solar)
name_hindi: पीएम सूर्य घर मुफ्त बिजली योजना
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Subsidy for rooftop solar installation to households for free electricity up to 300 units per month.
benefits: Central subsidy: Rs. 30,000 (1kW), Rs. 60,000 (2kW), Rs. 78,000 (3kW and above); Up to 300 units free electricity per month; State subsidies additional
documents_required: Aadhaar, Electricity bill, Bank account, House ownership documents
target_beneficiaries: All residential electricity consumers

name: Swachh Bharat Mission — Individual Household Toilet
ministry: Ministry of Jal Shakti (Rural) / Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Construction of individual household toilets for BPL/APL families to achieve open defecation free status.
benefits: Rs. 12,000 incentive for toilet construction (rural); Urban: Rs. 4,000 per unit; Free technical assistance
documents_required: Aadhaar, Ration card, Bank account, MGNREGS job card (rural), House proof
target_beneficiaries: Households without individual toilet facility

name: Jal Jeevan Mission — Har Ghar Jal
name_hindi: जल जीवन मिशन — हर घर जल
ministry: Ministry of Jal Shakti
description: Provide functional household tap connections to every rural household by 2024 for safe and potable drinking water.
benefits: Piped drinking water connection to every household; 55 litre per capita per day; No charge to household
benefit_amount: Free water connection and piped supply
documents_required: Aadhaar, Proof of residence
target_beneficiaries: All rural households without tap water connection
